results.title: IC Group Holdings Grants Stock Options to Executives as Part of 2025 Performance Bonus Program
results.description: Toronto, Ontario--(Newsfile Corp. - June 30, 2026) - IC Group Holdings Inc. (TSXV: ICGH) ("IC Group" or the "Company"), a consumer engagement company driving commerce and data for global brands and professional sports teams, is pleased to announce the granting of stock options to nine executives as part of their 2025 performance bonus program. results.title: GST: Moving towards adulthood in 9 years; already a major lever of consumption
results.description: GST was rolled out on the midnight of July 30, 2017 and has rapidly picked up since. It was perhaps the country’s most ambitious tax reform where all states came together eliminate their independent taxation powers and submitted to agree to a common framework, which would allow smooth transactions in a single framework.

results.title: Thai government says Thailand recognised as leading business destination
results.description: Thai government reported yesterday, June 29, that Thailand has been ranked 27th globally and seventh in Asia in the Best Countries for Starting a Business released by the U.S. News & World Report Best Countries 2026. The announcement was made by Deputy Spokesperson of the Prime Minister’s Office Lalida Persvivatana. The spokesperson said the ranking ... results.title: Islands council opposes plans for up to 60 wind turbines off Lewis
results.description: The Scottish government will have the final say on the proposed Spiorad na Mara project.

results.title: Antrim job fair could open doors into retail, care and manufacturing
results.description: An Antrim job fair could open doors into retail, care and manufacturing for local residents looking for work, a career change or a more secure route back into employment.

results.title: Milk, pulses, vegetables: How a weak monsoon could affect your grocery bill
results.description: Dairy executives say another milk price hike is possible if below-normal rainfall cuts fodder supply, while experts warn pulses, oilseeds and vegetables may also face pressure.

results.title: Salary isn't everything for Gen Z, 50% prioritize work-life balance while evaluating job offers: Naukri report
results.description: Gen Z professionals in India are increasingly prioritizing work-life balance and skill development over promotions and salary hikes, according to Naukri’s Gen Z Work Code report. 14% of Gen Z employees may quit within a year if growth is missing, compared to 3% of millennials.

results.title: Abia Cracks Down on Commercial Motorcycles as Restriction Enforcement Begins
results.description: The Abia State Government has commenced full enforcement of its restriction on commercial motorcycle operations in designated parts of the state, bringing an end to a one-week grace period granted to operators to comply with the new directive. The enforcement, which took effect on Monday, covers major urban centres including Umuahia, Aba and Ohafia, with [...]
